name: @podkit/ipod-avatar
description: ASCII iPod avatar rendering for CLI display

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node && bun run build:types
scripts.test:unit: FILES=$(find src -name '*.test.ts' ! -name '*.integration.test.ts' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILES" ] && bun test $FILES || echo 'No unit tests found'
